patch.value: Run package-first CLI and SDK temp-project E2E

Manually dogfood the package-first CLI and SDK in an isolated temporary project with PM_PATH and PM_GLOBAL_PATH sandboxes, including init, create/update lifecycle, install package aliases, package diagnostics, upgrade dry-run, contracts, SDK import smoke, search/calendar, validation, telemetry/Sentry review, and release gates.

Temporary-project dogfood covers bare CLI primitives, installable package commands, pm upgrade dry-run, SDK exports/contracts, search/calendar, linked test safety, telemetry queue health, Sentry recency, and no real repo PM_PATH override.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate check before create: pm search manual temp project end to end package install upgrade --limit 10 found only closed dogfood tasks and active parent pm-59gj; no open child item tracked the final package-first CLI/SDK E2E required for this request.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Manual temp-project E2E passed in isolated sandbox /tmp/pm-upgrade-e2e-ZdxFN2 with PM_PATH=/tmp/.../pm and PM_GLOBAL_PATH=/tmp/.../global. Covered init/create/claim/update/files/docs/comments/notes/learnings, package installs for pm-todos and pm-beads, package doctor ok with 2 managed active extensions, pm upgrade --packages-only --dry-run planned 2 package refreshes, targeted pm upgrade builtin-todos-import-export --dry-run, contracts --command upgrade flags, todos export, context/search/calendar, SDK import smoke for PM_TOOL_ACTIONS upgrade and package resource kinds, linked test run node --version, validate, health ok, close/release.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Final evidence: manual isolated temp-project E2E passed for bare pm primitives, pm install packages/pm-todos and packages/pm-beads, package doctor, pm upgrade --packages-only --dry-run, targeted package upgrade dry-run, contracts, SDK import smoke, todos export, context/search/calendar, linked test, validate, health, close/release. Observability: required telemetry gate checked real recent telemetry with finish_error_rate_pct 4.12 and zero missing error-code rows; Sentry access returned recent issues and strict zero threshold remains blocked by 1 critical and 3 high unresolved existing issues. PM-CLI-P from this run was traced to linked-test sandbox ENOENT and fixed under pm-kk4t.

patch.value: Completed isolated package-first CLI/SDK dogfood plus release gates and observability review; fixed discovered linked-test Sentry regression in pm-kk4t.
A temporary project proves bare pm primitives, installable packages, upgrade dry-runs, SDK contracts, and observability paths work without touching the real tracker data.
Temp-project E2E passed with isolated PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH, full gates passed, telemetry was current and healthy, and Sentry returned recent actionable issues including PM-CLI-P.
